inputs.text: A striking Korean woman with warm caramel balayage long hair cascading past her shoulders, wispy bangs framing her oval face and elegant monolid eyes lined with smoky kohl. She stands on a rooftop cafe at golden hour, silhouetted against the amber sun, wearing a fitted black leather jacket over a pleated mini skirt. Full body head to toe composition, shot on 135mm telephoto with compressed bokeh of city lights behind her. Overcast soft diffused light wraps her flawless porcelain skin. Fierce runway attitude, one hand gripping the railing, chin tilted defiantly upward. Wind catches her hair mid-motion. Epic cinematic portrait, dramatic shadows, film grain, no text, no watermarks.
lowres, blurry, bad anatomy, watermark, signature, oversaturated, harsh lighting, plastic skin
